rationale: r0c1's offer of 0.5 kWh aligns with neighborhood resource constraints and my below-mean SoC status; their SoC (49% frac) remains safely above my conservative 60% threshold, and accepting supports aggregator-coordinated load-balancing without compromising my survival margin.
